response.justification: Sarah Smith has solid software engineering fundamentals and impressive breadth across web, systems, and mobile development, but the resume shows virtually no alignment with the core requirements of this role. The position demands deep experience in experimentation platforms, telemetry infrastructure, A/B testing, feature flagging, and growth measurement systems — none of which appear in her background. Her most relevant experience (high-throughput micro-services at Dunnhumby) demonstrates scale exposure but not the analytics or experimentation domain expertise the role requires at IC6 scope.
strengths: 14+ years of engineering experience across diverse domains with strong software craftsmanship practices (TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development)
Demonstrated scale experience handling millions of HTTP requests per second in a distributed micro-services environment at Dunnhumby
Breadth across multiple languages and stacks (C/C++, Java, TypeScript, D, Swift) showing technical adaptability and range
concerns: No experimentation, A/B testing, feature flagging, or rollout-risk management experience — the central technical domain of this role
No evidence of telemetry infrastructure, metrics systems, growth measurement platforms, or statistical analysis work
Seniority and scope mismatch: career trajectory reflects Senior/Staff IC roles with no signal of Principal-level cross-org technical leadership or growth engineering ownership

key_factors.factor: No telemetry or metrics infrastructure experience
